results.title: English पढ़ना और बोलना सीखे Basic से | Basic English Class | Learn English Speaking by Dharmendra Sir
results.reason: Dharmendra Sir uses a traditional classroom approach that is very familiar and comforting for older learners starting from basics.
summary: Learn how to read English words correctly
Understand the basic sounds of the alphabet
Practice speaking simple sentences with confidence
Build a strong foundation for daily talking

results.title: आओ English सीखें | बिल्कुल Zero से शुरुआत करें । English Speaking Course Class 1 | Spoken English
results.reason: Widely regarded as the most viral and effective 'zero level' starting point for Hindi speakers, focusing on foundational confidence.
summary: Start learning English from the very beginning
Understand how to introduce yourself to others
Learn common words used in daily life
Follow a simple plan to start speaking

results.title: Day 1 Basics of English | बिल्कुल Zero से English सीखे। पहला दिन | 60 Days Spoken English Course
results.reason: Very comprehensive 90-minute session, but the length might be overwhelming for a beginner mom just starting out.
summary: Master the basic rules of English grammar
Learn how to form your first sentences
Practice listening to clear English examples
Get a complete guide for beginners' success

results.title: जीरो से English पढ़ना-लिखना सीखें, How to read and write in English, From zero level,Zero से English
results.reason: Kanchan Keshari is highly praised for her patient, mother-friendly teaching style that covers reading and writing alongside speaking.
summary: Learn to write letters and words clearly
Improve your English reading skills step by step
Understand how to spell common English words
Connect sounds to letters for better reading

results.title: पहले जड़ मजबूत करो फिर English सीखो, एकदम basic से एकदम zero से इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग || Sartaz Classes
results.reason: Focuses on 'strengthening the roots' (grammar basics) in a way that helps beginners understand the 'why' behind sentences.
summary: Focus on the most important basic rules
Fix common mistakes that beginners often make
Learn how to build simple English thoughts
Strengthen your skills before moving to advanced
